law: button label contrast on the actual fill
refute_by: a rendered-CSS contrast measurement over the rendered button measures below the claimed threshold
rendered_css: .btn-apple-dark-filled { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; border: 0; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 999px; min-height: 50px; padding: 14px 20px; background: #0a84ff; color: #ffffff; font: 600 17px/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; transition: all 250ms ease-in-out; }
